message:
feat: Enhance overlay header icons and analysis menu presentation

Improve visual consistency and discoverability of overlay panels by adding
proper header icons and refining the analysis menu presentation.

Overlay.tsx changes:
- Added missing icon imports: IconArrowRight, IconDiff, IconLearn, IconSettings
- Expanded OVERLAY_HEADER_ICONS mapping to cover more overlay types:
  - goto: Arrow icon for position navigation
  - settings: Settings gear icon
  - comparison: Diff icon for genome comparison
  - simulationView: Flask icon matching simulation hub
  - selectionPressure: Trending icon for dN/dS analysis
  - hgt: Layers icon for horizontal gene transfer
  - structureConstraint: Cube icon for RNA structures
  - gel: Aperture icon for gel electrophoresis
  - nonBDNA: DNA icon for alternative structures
  - foldQuickview: Aperture icon for protein folding
  - commandPalette: Keyboard icon
  - phasePortrait: Aperture icon for phase space
  - And additional overlay mappings for completeness

AnalysisMenu.tsx changes:
- Improved menu item icon styling with dedicated CSS class
- Enhanced visual alignment and spacing

These changes ensure all overlay panels have appropriate visual identifiers
in their headers, improving user orientation and interface consistency.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
